title: cyclosorus maxonianus
intro: Cyclosorus maxonianus, also known as the Maxonian cycad, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus maxonianus include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often dried and crushed to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
